title: AgentResponse
description: Response payload returned by the RAG agent.

conversation_id.description: Active conversation identifier that the client can reuse for later requests.

response_id.description: Responses API response identifier, when available.

agent_response.description: Text generated by the RAG agent.

references.description: References used or returned by the retrieval layer.

page.description: Page number in the source file, when available.

metadata.description: Additional metadata returned by the retrieval layer.

error.description: Optional error message. Null or absent when the request succeeds.
